channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-25 18:29 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Honestly at this point I'm a bit frustrated I didn't get my USAID-sponsored RPG
item.description: Honestly at this point I'm a bit frustrated I didn't get my USAID-sponsored RPG

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: Kazakhstan Railways is bringing Starlink internet to 900 train carriages this summer. • By...
item.description: BREAKING: Kazakhstan Railways is bringing Starlink internet to 900 train carriages this summer. • By July, around 900 train carriages will be equipped with Starlink internet. • The service will cover nearly 50 passenger routes across the country. • KTZ’s passenger fleet has about 2,211 units, with the goal of full network coverage by autumn. • The rollout is being done in stages as part of Kazakhstan’s railway transport modernization program • Starlink was first tested on the Burabay Express electric train in 2025. • Satellite internet has also been introduced on other major routes, including Astana–Ust-Kamenogorsk and Astana–Almaty Talgo trains. Starlink is proving again that high-speed satellite internet can transform travel, especially across large countries and remote routes.

item.title: @elonmusk: The real class war is between the productive class and the parasitic class.
item.description: The real class war is between the productive class and the parasitic class.

item.title: @elonmusk: The users who complain about the flaws in your product may seem annoying, but they are on the whole ...
item.description: The users who complain about the flaws in your product may seem annoying, but they are on the whole probably your most valuable users. They complain because they care, and I doubt a startup could ever get really big without users who care a lot about the product.

item.title: @elonmusk: Gotham has fallen. The mass exodus out of the New York will continue apace. I call it the Blue Exodu...
item.description: Gotham has fallen. The mass exodus out of the New York will continue apace. I call it the Blue Exodus. Last night’s sweep of Marxist Socialist candidates will further destroy New York City. The virulent antisemitism in the Socialists’ campaigns is dangerous not only to Jews, but to every American. Because they are attacking the West. If they continue to win, the American Dream and Western Civilization will fall. Wake up.

item.title: @elonmusk: I once reported on how great Wikipedia was. Now, it’s FULL of propaganda. That’s a big problem becau...
item.description: I once reported on how great Wikipedia was. Now, it’s FULL of propaganda. That’s a big problem because its bad information corrupts AI and search results:@npovmedia@AshleyRindsberg

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla has announced that it will increase production output at its Giga Berlin factory by another 20...
item.description: Tesla has announced that it will increase production output at its Giga Berlin factory by another 20% to 7,500 vehicles per week starting in October of this year. This is in addition to the 20% production output increase previously announced a few months ago. Tesla will hire 1,000 additional employees by October for this new increase in production. "3,500 additional jobs will be created in the short and medium term for vehicle and battery manufacturing at the plant," Tesla said.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tim Cook, who told The Wall Street Journal that the jump in costs was unlike anything he had seen “i...
item.description: Tim Cook, who told The Wall Street Journal that the jump in costs was unlike anything he had seen “in any area in over 40 years.” Biggest price jump in anything I’ve ever seen too.wsj.com/economy/the-data-cen…

item.title: @elonmusk: Wikipedia blocked its founder, Larry Sanger, from making edits to the site after he campaigned to ma...
item.description: Wikipedia blocked its founder, Larry Sanger, from making edits to the site after he campaigned to make it more fair and balanced, per NY Post.

item.title: @elonmusk: Potential name for the AI industry regulatory authority: AI Associated Institute of America, Inc or ...
item.description: Potential name for the AI industry regulatory authority: AI Associated Institute of America, Inc or AIAIAI, pronounced “ay yai yai”
